name: app.R
content:
# ============================================================ # 鴨場產蛋分析互動儀表板 # eggdash/app.R # # 前提：已執行 egganalysis1.R，產生以下 CSV（位於上層目錄）： # - daily_summary_all.csv / daily_summary2025.csv # - daily_line_summary.csv # - daily_age_weighted.csv # - missdate.csv（異常日期，可選） # - output/[LINE]g[GEN]_[YYYYMMDD].csv（個體資料） # # 執行方式：RStudio 開啟此檔案後點 Run App； # 或在 Console 執行 shiny::runApp("eggdash") # ============================================================ library(shiny) library(dplyr) library(ggplot2) library(plotly) library(DT) library(readr) library(stringr) # ── 常數 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── # 本機執行：資料在上層目錄（../） # Shinylive / 部署版：資料在 app 內的 data/ 子資料夾 DATA_ROOT <- if (file.exists("../daily_summary_all.csv")) ".." else "data" OUTPUT_DIR <- file.path(DATA_ROOT, "output") `%||%` <- function(a, b) if (!is.null(a) && length(a) > 0) a else b # ── 資料載入 ────────────────────────────────────────────────── safe_csv <- function(path, ...) { if (file.exists(path)) { tryCatch( read_csv(path, show_col_types = FALSE, ...), error = function(e) { message("讀取失敗：", path); NULL } ) } else NULL } load_data <- function() { # 1. 全場每日（優先全年版，次本年版） daily <- safe_csv(file.path(DATA_ROOT, "daily_summary_all.csv")) %||% safe_csv(file.path(DATA_ROOT, "daily_summary2025.csv")) if (!is.null(daily)) daily <- daily %>% mutate(date = as.Date(date)) # 2. 分品系/世代/日期（含 hatch） line_daily <- safe_csv(file.path(DATA_ROOT, "daily_line_summary.csv")) if (!is.null(line_daily)) { line_daily <- line_daily %>% mutate(date = as.Date(date), gen = as.character(gen)) } # 3. 分品系/世代/日齡（跨 hatch 加權） age_wt <- safe_csv(file.path(DATA_ROOT, "daily_age_weighted.csv")) if (!is.null(age_wt)) { age_wt <- age_wt %>% mutate(gen = as.character(gen)) } # 4. 異常日期 missdate <- safe_csv(file.path(DATA_ROOT, "missdate.csv")) if (!is.null(missdate) && "date" %in% names(missdate)) missdate <- missdate %>% mutate(date = as.Date(date)) # 4b. 全年分區產蛋（依 cage 首字母分區，供 Page1 依區域分色） region_all <- safe_csv(file.path(DATA_ROOT, "region_egg_data_all.csv")) if (!is.null(region_all)) region_all <- region_all %>% mutate(date = as.Date(date)) # 5. 個體資料：各品系最新世代 CSV ind <- tryCatch({ # 優先讀清單檔（Shinylive 虛擬檔案系統不支援 list.files） manifest <- file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "csv_manifest.txt") if (file.exists(manifest)) { csv_names <- readLines(manifest) csvs <- file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, csv_names) } else { csvs <- list.files(OUTPUT_DIR, pattern = "^L.*g\\d+_\\d{8}\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE) } if (length(csvs) == 0) return(NULL) file_df <- data.frame( path = csvs, key = str_remove(basename(csvs), "_\\d{8}\\.csv$"), date_key = str_extract(basename(csvs), "\\d{8}"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE ) %>% group_by(key) %>% slice_max(date_key, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>% ungroup() bind_rows(lapply(file_df$path, function(f) { tryCatch( read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE, na = ".") %>% mutate(gen = as.character(gen), sex = as.integer(sex)), error = function(e) NULL ) })) }, error = function(e) NULL) list(daily = daily, line_daily = line_daily, age_wt = age_wt, missdate = missdate, region_all = region_all, ind = ind) } # 啟動時載入一次（可透過「重新整理資料」按鈕重載） app_data <- load_data() # ── UI ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ui <- navbarPage( title = "🦆 產蛋分析儀表板", theme = NULL, # ── 頁面1：全場每日監控 ────────────────────────────────────── tabPanel("📊 全場日監控", sidebarLayout( sidebarPanel(width = 3, h4("篩選條件"), dateRangeInput("daily_daterange", "日期範圍", start = if (!is.null(app_data$daily)) min(app_data$daily$date, na.rm = TRUE) else Sys.Date() - 365, end = if (!is.null(app_data$daily)) max(app_data$daily$date, na.rm = TRUE) else Sys.Date(), format = "yyyy-mm-dd" ), radioButtons("daily_view", "顯示方式", choices = c("全場加總" = "total", "依區域分色" = "region"), selected = "total" ), hr(), actionButton("refresh_btn", "🔄 重新整理資料", class = "btn-sm btn-default"), hr(), helpText("資料來源：daily_summary_all.csv / daily_summary2025.csv") ), mainPanel(width = 9, # 異常日期警示 uiOutput("anomaly_banner"), # 摘要卡片 fluidRow( column(4, wellPanel(h5("近 7 天平均"), textOutput("avg7"))), column(4, wellPanel(h5("近 14 天平均"), textOutput("avg14"))), column(4, wellPanel(h5("近 30 天平均"), textOutput("avg30"))) ), plotlyOutput("p_daily", height = "400px"), hr(), h5("異常日期清單（前後日差 > 200）"), DTOutput("tbl_missdate") ) ) ), # ── 頁面2：族群趨勢 ────────────────────────────────────────── tabPanel("📈 族群趨勢", sidebarLayout( sidebarPanel(width = 3, h4("篩選條件"), checkboxGroupInput("trend_lines", "品系", choices = if (!is.null(app_data$age_wt)) sort(unique(app_data$age_wt$line)) else character(0), selected = if (!is.null(app_data$age_wt)) sort(unique(app_data$age_wt$line)) else character(0) ), checkboxGroupInput("trend_gens", "世代", choices = if (!is.null(app_data$age_wt)) sort(unique(app_data$age_wt$gen)) else character(0), selected = if (!is.null(app_data$age_wt)) sort(unique(app_data$age_wt$gen)) else character(0) ), hr(), radioButtons("trend_xaxis", "X 軸", choices = c("週齡（跨批次加權）" = "age", "日期（含各批次）" = "date"), selected = "age" ), radioButtons("trend_yaxis", "Y 軸", choices = c( "每日產蛋數" = "eggs", "隻舍產蛋率 %" = "housed", "隻日產蛋率 %" = "day" ), selected = "housed" ), checkboxInput("trend_smooth", "加平滑線（LOESS/GAM）", value = FALSE), checkboxInput("trend_facet", "分面顯示（品系×世代）", value = TRUE), helpText("取消勾選品系可排除特定品系（如 L201）") ), mainPanel(width = 9, plotlyOutput("p_trend", height = "500px") ) ) ), # ── 頁面3：個體查詢 ────────────────────────────────────────── tabPanel("🔍 個體查詢", sidebarLayout( sidebarPanel(width = 3, h4("篩選條件"), selectInput("ind_line", "品系", choices = c("全部" = "ALL", if (!is.null(app_data$ind)) sort(unique(app_data$ind$line)) else character(0)), selected = "ALL" ), selectInput("ind_gen", "世代", choices = c("全部" = "ALL", if (!is.null(app_data$ind)) sort(unique(app_data$ind$gen)) else character(0)), selected = "ALL" ), radioButtons("ind_sex", "性別", choices = c("全部" = "0", "母鴨" = "2", "公鴨" = "1"), selected = "2" ), hr(), sliderInput("ind_min_total", "最少總蛋數", min = 0, max = 400, value = 0, step = 10 ), sliderInput("ind_min_en40", "最少 EN40（週）", min = 0, max = 280, value = 0, step = 10 ), hr(), selectInput("ind_hist_var", "分布圖指標", choices = c("total_eggs", "EN40", "EN52", "age_first_egg", "EN14") ), hr(), downloadButton("download_ind", "⬇ 下載篩選結果 CSV") ), mainPanel(width = 9, fluidRow( column(7, h5("篩選結果"), DTOutput("tbl_ind") ), column(5, h5("分布圖"), plotlyOutput("p_ind_hist", height = "350px") ) ) ) ) ), # ── 頁面4：系譜查詢 ────────────────────────────────────────── tabPanel("🌳 系譜查詢", sidebarLayout( sidebarPanel(width = 3, h4("查詢"), textInput("ped_id", "個體號（duck）", placeholder = "例：310005"), actionButton("ped_search", "查詢", class = "btn-primary"), hr(), helpText("輸入個體號後按查詢，顯示基本資料及親代資訊。"), helpText("※ 目前版本從個體 CSV 查詢，系譜深度限於直接親代。") ), mainPanel(width = 9, uiOutput("ped_result") ) ) ), # ── 頁面5：族群比較 ────────────────────────────────────────── tabPanel("🔄 族群比較", sidebarLayout( sidebarPanel(width = 3, h4("選擇比較族群（最多3個）"), fluidRow( column(7, selectInput("cmp1_line", "族群1 品系", choices = c("（不選）" = "", if (!is.null(app_data$age_wt)) sort(unique(app_data$age_wt$line)) else character(0)))), column(5, selectInput("cmp1_gen", "世代", choices = c("（不選）" = ""))) ), fluidRow( column(7, selectInput("cmp2_line", "族群2 品系", choices = c("（不選）" = "", if (!is.null(app_data$age_wt)) sort(unique(app_data$age_wt$line)) else character(0)))), column(5, selectInput("cmp2_gen", "世代", choices = c("（不選）" = ""))) ), fluidRow( column(7, selectInput("cmp3_line", "族群3 品系", choices = c("（不選）" = "", if (!is.null(app_data$age_wt)) sort(unique(app_data$age_wt$line)) else character(0)))), column(5, selectInput("cmp3_gen", "世代", choices = c("（不選）" = ""))) ), hr(), radioButtons("cmp_xaxis", "X 軸", choices = c("週齡（跨批次加權）" = "age", "日期" = "date"), selected = "age"), radioButtons("cmp_yaxis", "Y 軸", choices = c("隻舍產蛋率 %" = "housed", "隻日產蛋率 %" = "day", "每日產蛋數" = "eggs"), selected = "housed"), checkboxInput("cmp_smooth", "加平滑線（LOESS）", value = FALSE), hr(), helpText("選擇最多 3 個品系+世代組合，疊加在同一圖上比較。"), helpText("留白代表不選該族群。") ), mainPanel(width = 9, plotlyOutput("p_compare", height = "500px") ) ) ) ) # ── SERVER ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── server <- function(input, output, session) { # 重新整理資料 rv <- reactiveValues(data = app_data) observeEvent(input$refresh_btn, { rv$data <- load_data() showNotification("資料已重新整理", type = "message", duration = 3) # 更新品系/世代選項 new_lines <- if (!is.null(rv$data$age_wt)) sort(unique(rv$data$age_wt$line)) else character(0) new_gens <- if (!is.null(rv$data$age_wt)) sort(unique(rv$data$age_wt$gen)) else character(0) updateCheckboxGroupInput(session, "trend_lines", choices = new_lines, selected = new_lines) updateCheckboxGroupInput(session, "trend_gens", choices = new_gens, selected = new_gens) }) # 族群趨勢：選品系後動態更新可用世代（只顯示該品系實際有的世代） observeEvent(input$trend_lines, { wt <- rv$data$age_wt if (is.null(wt) || length(input$trend_lines) == 0) return() available_gens <- wt %>% filter(line %in% input$trend_lines) %>% pull(gen) %>% unique() %>% sort() keep <- intersect(input$trend_gens, available_gens) updateCheckboxGroupInput(session, "trend_gens", choices = available_gens, selected = if (length(keep) > 0) keep else available_gens ) }, ignoreInit = TRUE) # ── 頁面1 ────────────────────────────────────────────────── # 異常警示 output$anomaly_banner <- renderUI({ miss <- rv$data$missdate if (is.null(miss)) return(NULL) # missdate.csv 初次寫出時無 problem 欄，需手動新增後重新整理 if (!"problem" %in% names(miss)) { return(div(class = "alert alert-info", paste0("ℹ️ missdate.csv 尚無 problem 欄（共 ", nrow(miss), " 筆異常日期）。請在 CSV 中新增 problem 欄並標記後，按「重新整理資料」。"))) } unmarked <- miss %>% filter(is.na(problem) | problem != "*") if (nrow(unmarked) == 0) return(NULL) div(class = "alert alert-warning", paste0("⚠️ 有 ", nrow(unmarked), " 個異常日期尚未在 missdate.csv 標記 problem 欄。")) }) # 全場每日摘要（篩選日期後） daily_filtered <- reactive({ d <- rv$data$daily if (is.null(d)) return(NULL) d %>% filter(date >= input$daily_daterange[1], date <= input$daily_daterange[2]) }) recent_avg <- function(days) { d <- rv$data$daily if (is.null(d)) return(NA) d %>% filter(date >= max(date, na.rm = TRUE) - days + 1) %>% summarize(avg = mean(total, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% pull(avg) %>% round(1) } output$avg7 <- renderText({ paste0(recent_avg(7), " 顆/日") }) output$avg14 <- renderText({ paste0(recent_avg(14), " 顆/日") }) output$avg30 <- renderText({ paste0(recent_avg(30), " 顆/日") }) output$p_daily <- renderPlotly({ df <- daily_filtered() if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) return(plotly_empty(type="scatter")) if (input$daily_view == "total") { # 全場加總：改用 plot_ly() 直接繪製，避免 ggplotly 的 text 在 aes() 導致 mode="text" 線段消失 return( plot_ly(df, x = ~date, y = ~total, type = "scatter", mode = "lines", text = ~paste0(format(date, "%Y-%m-%d"), "
總蛋數：", total), hoverinfo = "text", line = list(color = "#2171b5", width = 1.5)) %>% layout( title = list(text = "全場每日總產蛋數"), xaxis = list(title = "日期", tickformat = "%Y-%m", dtick = "M3", tickangle = -45), yaxis = list(title = "總蛋數"), hovermode = "x unified" ) ) } else { # 依區域：使用 region_egg_data_all.csv（cage 首字母 = 真實棟區 A/B/K...） ra <- rv$data$region_all if (is.null(ra)) return(plotly_empty(type = "scatter")) region_df <- ra %>% filter(date >= input$daily_daterange[1], date <= input$daily_daterange[2]) %>% mutate(tooltip = paste0(format(date, "%Y-%m-%d"), "
", region, "：", total_eggs)) if (nrow(region_df) == 0) return(plotly_empty(type = "scatter")) return( plot_ly(region_df, x = ~date, y = ~total_eggs, color = ~region, colors = "Dark2", type = "scatter", mode = "lines", text = ~tooltip, hoverinfo = "text", line = list(width = 1.5)) %>% layout( title = list(text = "每日分品系產蛋數（依品系首字母分色）"), xaxis = list(title = "日期", tickformat = "%m/%d", tickangle = -45), yaxis = list(title = "產蛋數"), hovermode = "x unified", legend = list(title = list(text = "區域")) ) ) } }) output$tbl_missdate <- renderDT({ miss <- rv$data$missdate if (is.null(miss)) return(datatable(data.frame(提示 = "missdate.csv 不存在或尚未執行 egganalysis1.R"))) datatable(miss, options = list(pageLength = 10, scrollX = TRUE), rownames = FALSE) }) # ── 頁面2 ────────────────────────────────────────────────── output$p_trend <- renderPlotly({ if (input$trend_xaxis == "age") { # 用日齡加權資料（跨批次合併） df <- rv$data$age_wt if (is.null(df)) return(plotly_empty()) df <- df %>% filter(line %in% input$trend_lines, gen %in% input$trend_gens) if (nrow(df) == 0) return(plotly_empty()) # y 軸對應 y_col <- switch(input$trend_yaxis, eggs = "daily_eggs_total", housed = "hen_housed_production", day = "hen_day_production" ) y_lab <- switch(input$trend_yaxis, eggs = "每日產蛋數", housed = "隻舍產蛋率", day = "隻日產蛋率" ) y_scale <- if (input$trend_yaxis != "eggs") 100 else 1 y_suffix <- if (input$trend_yaxis != "eggs") " %" else " 顆" df <- df %>% mutate( y_val = .data[[y_col]] * y_scale, group = paste0(line, "g", gen), week = day_age / 7, tooltip = paste0(line, " 第", gen, "代", "
週齡：", round(week, 1), "
", y_lab, "：", round(y_val, 1), y_suffix) ) p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = week, y = y_val, color = group, group = group, text = tooltip)) + geom_line(alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 0.8) + labs(title = paste0("各品系世代 ", y_lab, " 隨週齡變化"), x = "週齡 (週)", y = paste0(y_lab, y_suffix), color = "品系‧世代") + theme_bw() if (input$trend_smooth) { p <- p + geom_smooth(aes(group = group), method = "loess", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) } if (input$trend_facet) { p <- p + facet_wrap(~ line + gen, scales = "free_x") } ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text") } else { # 用日期資料（含 hatch）→ 按 (line, gen, date) 聚合 df <- rv$data$line_daily if (is.null(df)) return(plotly_empty()) df_agg <- df %>% filter(line %in% input$trend_lines, gen %in% input$trend_gens) %>% group_by(date, line, gen) %>% summarize( daily_eggs = sum(daily_eggs, na.rm = TRUE), female_count = sum(female_count, na.rm = TRUE), female_real = sum(female_real, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop" ) %>% mutate( hen_housed_production = if_else(female_count > 0, daily_eggs / female_count, NA_real_), hen_day_production = if_else(female_real > 0, daily_eggs / female_real, NA_real_) ) if (nrow(df_agg) == 0) return(plotly_empty()) y_col <- switch(input$trend_yaxis, eggs = "daily_eggs", housed = "hen_housed_production", day = "hen_day_production" ) y_lab <- switch(input$trend_yaxis, eggs = "每日產蛋數", housed = "隻舍產蛋率", day = "隻日產蛋率" ) y_scale <- if (input$trend_yaxis != "eggs") 100 else 1 y_suffix <- if (input$trend_yaxis != "eggs") " %" else " 顆" df_agg <- df_agg %>% mutate( y_val = .data[[y_col]] * y_scale, group = paste0(line, "g", gen), tooltip = paste0(line, " 第", gen, "代", "
日期：", date, "
", y_lab, "：", round(y_val, 1), y_suffix) ) p <- ggplot(df_agg, aes(x = date, y = y_val, color = group, group = group, text = tooltip)) + geom_line(alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 0.8) + scale_x_date(date_breaks = "3 months", date_labels = "%Y-%m") + labs(title = paste0("各品系世代 ", y_lab, " 隨日期變化"), x = "日期", y = paste0(y_lab, y_suffix), color = "品系‧世代") + theme_bw() + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) if (input$trend_smooth) { p <- p + geom_smooth(aes(group = group), method = "loess", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) } if (input$trend_facet) { p <- p + facet_wrap(~ line + gen, scales = "free_x") } ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text") } }) # ── 頁面3 ────────────────────────────────────────────────── ind_filtered <- reactive({ df <- rv$data$ind if (is.null(df)) return(NULL) if (input$ind_line != "ALL") df <- df %>% filter(line == input$ind_line) if (input$ind_gen != "ALL") df <- df %>% filter(gen == input$ind_gen) if (input$ind_sex != "0") df <- df %>% filter(sex == as.integer(input$ind_sex)) if (!is.null(df$total_eggs)) df <- df %>% filter(is.na(total_eggs) | total_eggs >= input$ind_min_total) if (!is.null(df$EN40)) df <- df %>% filter(is.na(EN40) | EN40 >= input$ind_min_en40) df }) # 品系/世代動態選項 observe({ df <- rv$data$ind if (is.null(df)) return() lines <- c("全部" = "ALL", sort(unique(df$line))) updateSelectInput(session, "ind_line", choices = lines) }) observe({ df <- rv$data$ind if (is.null(df)) return() cur_line <- input$ind_line gens <- if (cur_line == "ALL") sort(unique(df$gen)) else sort(unique(df$gen[df$line == cur_line])) updateSelectInput(session, "ind_gen", choices = c("全部" = "ALL", gens)) }) # 顯示欄位 IND_COLS <- c("duck", "cage", "line", "gen", "hatch", "sex", "birthday", "firstegg", "total_eggs", "EN40", "EN52", "EN14", "age_first_egg", "last_age") output$tbl_ind <- renderDT({ df <- ind_filtered() if (is.null(df)) return(datatable(data.frame(提示 = "無個體資料或篩選結果為空"))) show_cols <- intersect(IND_COLS, names(df)) datatable( df %>% select(all_of(show_cols)), filter = "top", rownames = FALSE, options = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE, columnDefs = list(list(className = "dt-right", targets = which(show_cols %in% c("total_eggs","EN40","EN52","EN14","age_first_egg","last_age")) - 1))) ) %>% formatRound(intersect(c("EN40","EN52"), show_cols), digits = 0) }) output$p_ind_hist <- renderPlotly({ df <- ind_filtered() if (is.null(df)) return(plotly_empty()) var <- input$ind_hist_var if (!var %in% names(df)) return(plotly_empty()) df2 <- df %>% select(val = !!sym(var)) %>% filter(!is.na(val)) if (nrow(df2) == 0) return(plotly_empty()) p <- ggplot(df2, aes(x = val)) + geom_histogram(fill = "#2171b5", color = "white", bins = 20) + labs(title = paste0(var, " 分布"), x = var, y = "頻次") + theme_bw() ggplotly(p) }) output$download_ind <- downloadHandler( filename = function() paste0("ind_export_", Sys.Date(), ".csv"), content = function(file) { df <- ind_filtered() if (!is.null(df)) write.csv(df, file, row.names = FALSE, na = ".") } ) # ── 頁面4 ────────────────────────────────────────────────── ped_result <- eventReactive(input$ped_search, { id <- trimws(input$ped_id) df <- rv$data$ind if (is.null(df) || id == "") return(NULL) df %>% filter(duck == id) }) output$ped_result <- renderUI({ res <- ped_result() if (is.null(res)) { return(helpText("請輸入個體號後按查詢。")) } if (nrow(res) == 0) { return(div(class = "alert alert-warning", paste0("找不到個體號「", input$ped_id, "」的資料。"))) } r <- res[1, ] # 若多世代對應取第一筆 # 查親代 sire_info <- if ("sire" %in% names(r) && !is.na(r$sire)) { s <- rv$data$ind %>% filter(duck == as.character(r$sire)) if (nrow(s) > 0) paste0(s$duck[1], "（", s$line[1], " 第", s$gen[1], "代）") else as.character(r$sire) } else "（無資料）" dam_info <- if ("dam" %in% names(r) && !is.na(r$dam)) { d <- rv$data$ind %>% filter(duck == as.character(r$dam)) if (nrow(d) > 0) paste0(d$duck[1], "（", d$line[1], " 第", d$gen[1], "代）") else as.character(r$dam) } else "（無資料）" tagList( h4(paste0("個體 ", r$duck)), fluidRow( column(6, wellPanel( tags$table(class = "table table-sm", tags$tr(tags$th("品系"), tags$td(r$line %||% "-")), tags$tr(tags$th("世代"), tags$td(r$gen %||% "-")), tags$tr(tags$th("批次"), tags$td(if ("hatch" %in% names(r)) r$hatch %||% "-" else "-")), tags$tr(tags$th("性別"), tags$td(if (!is.na(r$sex)) ifelse(r$sex == 2, "母", "公") else "-")), tags$tr(tags$th("籠號"), tags$td(r$cage %||% "-")), tags$tr(tags$th("出生日"), tags$td(as.character(r$birthday %||% "-"))) ) ) ), column(6, wellPanel( tags$table(class = "table table-sm", tags$tr(tags$th("父（sire）"), tags$td(sire_info)), tags$tr(tags$th("母（dam）"), tags$td(dam_info)), tags$tr(tags$th("初產日"), tags$td(as.character(r$firstegg %||% "-"))), tags$tr(tags$th("總蛋數"), tags$td(r$total_eggs %||% "-")), tags$tr(tags$th("EN40"), tags$td(round(r$EN40 %||% NA, 0))), tags$tr(tags$th("EN52"), tags$td(round(r$EN52 %||% NA, 0))) ) ) ) ) ) }) # ── 頁面5：族群比較 ────────────────────────────────────────── # 各品系選擇後動態更新對應世代選項 for (i in 1:3) { local({ idx <- i line_id <- paste0("cmp", idx, "_line") gen_id <- paste0("cmp", idx, "_gen") observeEvent(input[[line_id]], { selected_line <- input[[line_id]] wt <- rv$data$age_wt if (selected_line == "" || is.null(wt)) { updateSelectInput(session, gen_id, choices = c("（不選）" = "")) return() } gens <- wt %>% filter(line == selected_line) %>% pull(gen) %>% unique() %>% sort() updateSelectInput(session, gen_id, choices = c("（不選）" = "", setNames(gens, paste0("第", gens, "代")))) }, ignoreInit = FALSE) }) } # 比較圖 output$p_compare <- renderPlotly({ wt <- rv$data$age_wt ldate <- rv$data$line_daily if (is.null(wt) && is.null(ldate)) return(plotly_empty()) # 收集 3 個族群設定 groups_sel <- list( list(line = input$cmp1_line, gen = input$cmp1_gen), list(line = input$cmp2_line, gen = input$cmp2_gen), list(line = input$cmp3_line, gen = input$cmp3_gen) ) COLORS <- c("#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c") # 藍/橘/綠 y_col <- switch(input$cmp_yaxis, housed = "hen_housed_production", day = "hen_day_production", eggs = if (input$cmp_xaxis == "age") "daily_eggs_total" else "daily_eggs" ) y_lab <- switch(input$cmp_yaxis, housed = "隻舍產蛋率", day = "隻日產蛋率", eggs = "每日產蛋數") y_scale <- if (input$cmp_yaxis != "eggs") 100 else 1 y_suffix <- if (input$cmp_yaxis != "eggs") " %" else " 顆" pl <- plot_ly() has_trace <- FALSE for (i in seq_along(groups_sel)) { g <- groups_sel[[i]] if (g$line == "" || g$gen == "") next if (input$cmp_xaxis == "age") { src <- wt if (is.null(src)) next df_g <- src %>% filter(line == g$line, gen == g$gen) if (nrow(df_g) == 0) next df_g <- df_g %>% mutate(x_val = day_age / 7, y_val = .data[[y_col]] * y_scale, label = paste0(g$line, " 第", g$gen, "代", "
週齡：", round(day_age / 7, 1), "
", y_lab, "：", round(.data[[y_col]] * y_scale, 1), y_suffix)) if (input$cmp_smooth) { lo <- loess(y_val ~ x_val, data = df_g, span = 0.3) df_g$y_smooth <- predict(lo, df_g$x_val) } pl <- pl %>% add_trace(data = df_g, x = ~x_val, y = ~y_val, name = paste0(g$line, "g", g$gen), type = "scatter", mode = "lines", line = list(color = COLORS[i], width = 1.2), text = ~label, hoverinfo = "text") if (input$cmp_smooth) { pl <- pl %>% add_trace(data = df_g, x = ~x_val, y = ~y_smooth, name = paste0(g$line, "g", g$gen, "（平滑）"), type = "scatter", mode = "lines", line = list(color = COLORS[i], width = 2, dash = "dash"), hoverinfo = "skip", showlegend = FALSE) } } else { src <- ldate if (is.null(src)) next df_g <- src %>% filter(line == g$line, gen == g$gen) %>% group_by(date) %>% summarize( daily_eggs = sum(daily_eggs, na.rm = TRUE), female_count = sum(female_count, na.rm = TRUE), female_real = sum(female_real, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop" ) %>% mutate( hen_housed_production = if_else(female_count > 0, daily_eggs / female_count, NA_real_), hen_day_production = if_else(female_real > 0, daily_eggs / female_real, NA_real_) ) if (nrow(df_g) == 0) next df_g <- df_g %>% mutate(y_val = .data[[y_col]] * y_scale, label = paste0(g$line, " 第", g$gen, "代", "
日期：", format(date, "%Y-%m-%d"), "
", y_lab, "：", round(y_val, 1), y_suffix)) pl <- pl %>% add_trace(data = df_g, x = ~date, y = ~y_val, name = paste0(g$line, "g", g$gen), type = "scatter", mode = "lines", line = list(color = COLORS[i], width = 1.2), text = ~label, hoverinfo = "text") } has_trace <- TRUE } if (!has_trace) { return(plotly_empty() %>% layout(title = list(text = "請在左側選擇至少一個族群"))) } x_title <- if (input$cmp_xaxis == "age") "週齡 (週)" else "日期" pl %>% layout( title = list(text = paste0("族群比較：", y_lab)), xaxis = list(title = x_title), yaxis = list(title = paste0(y_lab, y_suffix)), hovermode = "x unified", legend = list(title = list(text = "品系‧世代")) ) }) } # 同網段分享：shiny::runApp("eggdash", host = "0.0.0.0", port = 3838) # 同仁用瀏覽器開：http://[執行者的IP]:3838 shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
